description_long: This object appears to be a highly distorted and abstract representation of a human adult pedestrian, with elongated and twisted limbs and body. The form is stretched and warped, with the arms and legs appearing unnaturally thin and extended, and the torso and head barely distinguishable. The surface texture is irregular, with a mix of smooth and jagged areas, and the overall silhouette is asymmetrical and surreal. The object lacks clear anatomical features such as a face, hands, or feet, making it difficult to identify specific clothing or accessories. The coloration is a blend of flesh-like tones with black and white marbled patterns, further contributing to its abstract appearance. This figure would stand out in any urban context due to its unusual and non-realistic form.
description: A highly abstract, distorted adult pedestrian figure with elongated limbs and a marbled, flesh-toned surface. The form is surreal and lacks clear anatomical or clothing details.
description_view_0: From this angle, the elongated limbs and twisted torso are most prominent, with the marbled surface pattern clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the extreme stretching of the body and the irregular, jagged edges of the form.
description_view_2: The back view shows the warped structure of the limbs and the lack of distinguishable anatomical features.
description_view_3: This perspective highlights the asymmetry of the figure and the abstract, flowing lines of the body.
attribute_clothing_type: indistinguishable due to extreme distortion and lack of clear garment features
attribute_posture: extremely distorted, with limbs and body unnaturally stretched and twisted
